positive: Minimalist abstract fox silhouette amongst geometric mountain peaks, using negative space and bold color blocking. The fox is depicted in a confident, leaping pose, set against a stylized, abstract background of interlocking pastel geometric shapes (pale sage green, burnt orange, soft lavender). The composition must be centrally balanced, highly contrasting, and optimized for screen printing. Clean linework, sharp edges, graphic design style, flat color gradients, inspired by mid-century modern art, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect symmetry, white background for maximum print impact.
